creator: clsung@FreeBSD.org
text:
repocopy request ports/audio/libtunepimp -> ports/audio/libtunepimp-old

Fix: 

Suggestion:
    To have audio/libtunepimp-old (0.4) until juk/amarok have updates.
How-To-Repeat:     audio/juk and audio/amarok depend on libtunepimp, but new version (0.5)
    of libtunepimp made some changes. It then cause juk/amarok build error.

    mich@ has noted that update process of juk/amarok had been too slow.
